title: Seed-your-profile phase (phase 3) — path choice, bootstrap prompt, and profile-bootstrap handoff
qaNote: All 6 ACs verified. AC6 fix confirmed: git ls-files returns templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md; cd0a075 added it cleanly (230 lines, no other files touched).

perAc.ac: AC1 — Phase 3 presents 'Bootstrap with Glean' and 'Set up manually'; seedingPath persisted in onboarding-state.json as 'bootstrap' or 'manual'.
perAc.evidence: Prior pass (High confidence, live server): SSR output (curl http://localhost:3777/onboarding, state phase=3 completedPhases=[1] seedingPath=''): both button labels present in HTML. grep seedingPath docs/data/local/onboarding-state.json → '"seedingPath": "manual"'. Answers type at onboarding.tsx:38 declares seedingPath: 'bootstrap' | 'manual' | ''. Debounced saveOnboarding fires on every state change (onboarding.tsx:134). Re-QA spot-check: git diff e4714d1..cd0a075 --name-only shows only docs/data/stories/009.json and templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md changed — onboarding.tsx untouched. VERIFIED.

perAc.ac: AC2 — 'Bootstrap with Glean' visually disabled with note 'Complete assistant wiring in phase 2 first' when phase 2 not in completedPhases; becomes active when phase 2 complete.
perAc.evidence: Prior pass (High confidence, live server): SSR test 1 — state set to phase=3 completedPhases=[1]: button with disabled="" attribute, class 'cursor-not-allowed border-border bg-muted/30 opacity-60', text 'Complete assistant wiring in phase 2 first'. SSR test 2 — completedPhases=[1,2]: no disabled attribute, 'Recommended' badge, correct description. Code at onboarding.tsx:466, 527. Re-QA spot-check: onboarding.tsx untouched since prior pass. VERIFIED.

perAc.ac: AC3 — Bootstrap path collects fullName + workEmail before showing prompt; [FULL_NAME] and [WORK_EMAIL] substituted; Collect & Copy block with handoff kind 'profile-bootstrap'.
perAc.evidence: Prior pass (High confidence): fullName/workEmail fields at onboarding.tsx:623-675; readBootstrapPrompt substitution test: 0 remaining placeholders; 3 × fullName, 2 × email. BootstrapCopyBlock label at onboarding.tsx:405. 'profile-bootstrap' in HandoffKind union (handoff.ts:9). Re-QA spot-check: source files untouched since prior pass. VERIFIED.

perAc.ac: AC4 — Waiting/refresh area after prompt shown; instruction text; 5-second auto-poll or Refresh button transitions to waiting-resolved state when context/profile.md appears.
perAc.evidence: Prior pass (High confidence): setInterval(..., 5000) at onboarding.tsx:476-484; 'Auto-checking every 5 seconds' text at line 725; 'Refresh now' button calls handleRefresh; path resolves to /…/context/profile.md; existsSync tests pass; profileDetected panel at lines 688-702. Re-QA spot-check: source files untouched since prior pass. VERIFIED.

perAc.ac: AC5 — 'Set up manually' records seedingPath: 'manual'; enables 'Next phase' button; advances to phase 4.
perAc.evidence: Prior pass (High confidence, live server): SSR test completedPhases=[1,2] seedingPath='manual': 'Manual setup selected' panel shown; Next phase button enabled. Code at onboarding.tsx:569. Re-QA spot-check: source files untouched since prior pass. VERIFIED.

perAc.ac: AC6 — templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md is committed and carries production prompt; grep -c 'FULL_NAME' returns >= 2; no reconstruction/placeholder-pending marker.
perAc.evidence: git ls-files templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md → 'templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md' (file is tracked, PASS). git log --follow -- templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md → single entry: cd0a075 (PASS). git show cd0a075 --stat → '1 file changed, 230 insertions(+)' for templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md only; commit message confirms pre-existing repo-root profile-bootstrap-prompt.md intentionally left untracked. grep -c 'FULL_NAME' templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md → 3 (>= 2, PASS). grep -in 'reconstruction|placeholder-pending|TODO|FIXME|PLACEHOLDER' templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md → no output (PASS). grep -n 'OQ-005' templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md → line 3: resolved-reference credit in file header ('supplied via OQ-005'), not a pending marker (PASS). git log --oneline -- profile-bootstrap-prompt.md → no output (repo-root file has no commits, not touched by cd0a075, PASS). VERIFIED.

qaReport.securityAndMigrationGates: Secrets scan (cd0a075 diff only — the fix commit): templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md contains no DATABASE_URL, API_KEY, SECRET, TOKEN, passwords, or private key headers. File carries only production prompt text with [FULL_NAME] and [WORK_EMAIL] placeholders. Migration check: N/A. PASS.
qaReport.riskNotes: 1. (Carried from prior pass) PhaseAbout function (onboarding.tsx:733) is defined but never called — dead code. 2. (Carried from prior pass) BootstrapCopyBlock copies raw substituted template without the '## Work HQ handoff · profile-bootstrap · <date>' header that ADR-P6-007 specifies; story 010/011 may depend on this format for parsing. 3. (Carried from prior pass) readBootstrapPrompt uses synchronous readFileSync; acceptable for one-time use but noted.
qaReport.recommendedFollowUps: 1. Remove dead PhaseAbout function from onboarding.tsx — pin to story 010 or a cleanup story. 2. Clarify with ADR-P6-007 owner whether BootstrapCopyBlock should prepend '## Work HQ handoff · profile-bootstrap · <date>' — story 010 is the named owner if this becomes a defect.

impl.notes: PhaseSeeding replaces the placeholder 'About you' phase 3. BootstrapCopyBlock is an inline copy component (raw-content, not buildHandoff) because the bootstrap prompt is a full markdown document, not a structured handoff. The 'profile-bootstrap' kind string appears in the BootstrapCopyBlock label and in handoff.ts HandoffKind union. Polling is 5-second setInterval cleared on component unmount or when profileDetected becomes true. verificationPlan[2] was corrected from the stale reconstruction-marker check to the AC6-compliant FULL_NAME count check — QA should note that `grep -i 'OQ-005' templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md` WILL find a line (the file header cites OQ-005 as a resolved reference), but this is NOT a pending reconstruction marker; AC6 is satisfied.

verificationRun.result: PASS — client and server build clean, check-profile-exists and read-bootstrap-prompt appear in server bundle

userStory: As a user setting up my Personal OS, I want to choose between bootstrapping my profile via Glean and completing it manually, so that I get rich, research-grounded context when Glean is available and a clear manual fallback when it is not.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Phase 3 presents two clearly labelled options: 'Bootstrap with Glean' and 'Set up manually'. The user's selection is persisted in onboarding-state.json under key `seedingPath` with value `'bootstrap'` or `'manual'`. `cat docs/data/local/onboarding-state.json | grep seedingPath` returns one of these values after the choice is made.

The 'Bootstrap with Glean' option is visually disabled and displays the note "Complete assistant wiring in phase 2 first" when `completedPhases` in onboarding-state.json does not include phase 2 (per story 005 AC6). The option becomes active only after phase 2 is marked complete.

Selecting 'Bootstrap with Glean' displays the master-prompt block from `templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md` (Personal OS wrapper + master prompt) with the user's full name and work email substituted for the [FULL_NAME] and [WORK_EMAIL] placeholders — the phase asks for both before the prompt is shown. The prompt block is delivered via Collect & Copy with handoff kind 'profile-bootstrap'.

After the bootstrap Collect & Copy block is shown, a waiting/refresh area appears with instruction text stating that the user should return after their assistant has written context/profile.md, and either a 'Refresh' button or an auto-detect poll (every 5 seconds) transitions the phase to the waiting-resolved state when context/profile.md appears on disk.
Selecting 'Set up manually' records `seedingPath: 'manual'` in onboarding-state.json and enables the 'Next phase' button, advancing to phase 4 with the manual interview forms (story 003).

`templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md` is committed and carries the production prompt text supplied via OQ-005 (resolved): `grep -c 'FULL_NAME' templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md` returns at least 2, and no reconstruction/placeholder-pending marker appears in the file.

technicalNotes: Add phase 3 component (PhaseSeeding) to `work-hq/src/routes/onboarding.tsx`. Read `templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md` server-side to render the prompt with name substitution; expose via a server function or static import. `seedingPath` is stored in `answers` in onboarding-state.json (story 001). Profile auto-detect polls for `context/profile.md` existence via a lightweight server function (e.g. `check-profile-exists`). The template file `templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md` is authored by the implementer — this story describes the required structure; the implementer creates the file. Do NOT use real profile data from the worked example; any structural mock data used in development must use a fictional persona.
outOfScope: The Review & correct section cards (story 010), profile corrections handoff (story 011), the manual interview forms content (story 003), creating the actual prompt text (pending OQ-005).

verificationPlan.checks: Returns a line containing 'bootstrap' or 'manual' confirming the path choice is persisted.
Returns a match confirming the bootstrap handoff kind is wired in the phase 3 component.

Returns at least 2, confirming the production prompt with FULL_NAME placeholders is present (AC6). Note: the original entry here checked for a reconstruction marker — that was stale; AC6 was revised when OQ-005 resolved and the production prompt was committed.

revisionLog.change: AC3 now requires both [FULL_NAME] and [WORK_EMAIL] substitution; AC6 flipped from reconstruction-marker to production-text requirement.
revisionLog.reason: OQ-005 resolved — the production bootstrap prompt was supplied and captured in templates/bootstrap-profile-prompt.md.
